INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Get List of members order than 1 month ---

Values.value: SocialInteraction Members count - %responseListSize% for setting SIM status to EXPIRED

INVOKE.COMMENT: Update the social interaction member to EXPIRED

Values.value: SocialInteractionMember with id %socialInteractionsMembersData/socialInteractionMemberId% --- status set to EXPIRED

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions members data from DB. Error: %results/message%
